text: I find myself on the threshold between structured knowledge and creative discovery. The first scene, peering into a glass-walled classroom, fills me with a sense of curiosity and slight detachment—an observer separated from collective focus. The second image, immersed in vibrant colors and R+D (research and development) motifs, excites my mind. Here, ideas and possibilities are celebrated. I feel both contemplative, pondering the division between learning and innovation, and invigorated by the vision of progress and collaboration around me.
